category_sources: source_facts.description says it lets OnlyKey act as a hardware SSH/GPG device; official docs say OnlyKey Agent is a hardware-based SSH and GPG agent at https://docs.onlykey.io/onlykey-agent.html.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and docs use onlykey-agent at https://github.com/trustcrypto/onlykey-agent and https://docs.onlykey.io/onlykey-agent.html.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the OnlyKey Agent documentation; docs.onlykey.io provides SSH/GPG quickstart, install, and advanced options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository https://github.com/trustcrypto/onlykey-agent identifies the project and links to the official docs.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://docs.onlykey.io/onlykey-agent.html describe SSH and GPG agent use with OnlyKey; GitHub repository language is Python at https://github.com/trustcrypto/onlykey-agent.
